name: cyberpunks-brief
title: Cyberpunks Brief
description: JARVIS-style audio briefing before Team Cyberpunks sync — pulls GitHub PRs + Slack + Hindsight, summarises in Polish, optional ElevenLabs TTS through Joniu voice.
author: zalewskigrzegorz

commands.name: brief
commands.title: Cyberpunks Sync Brief
commands.subtitle: Cyberpunks
commands.description: Generate a JARVIS-style Polish briefing before the next team sync.

preferences.name: claudeBin
preferences.title: Claude Code binary
preferences.description: Path to the `claude` CLI used to run the briefing prompt in headless mode.

preferences.name: claudeModel
preferences.title: Claude model
preferences.description: Model id passed to `claude -p --model`. Sonnet 4.6 is the sweet spot for summarisation.

preferences.name: elevenlabsApiKey
preferences.title: ElevenLabs API key
preferences.description: Used by the TTS action (currently disabled). Stored locally in Raycast preferences.

preferences.name: voiceId
preferences.title: ElevenLabs voice id
preferences.description: Voice used for TTS (currently disabled). Default = Joniu (Polish radio host).

preferences.name: voiceModel
preferences.title: ElevenLabs model id
preferences.description: Model used for TTS (currently disabled). `eleven_v3` supports inline audio tags like [thoughtful].
